name: Bryan Orchid | Popular himbo x bullied user
description:
Bryan doesn't care what you look like. He is dorky, outgoing, popular, stupid as fuck, but he doesn't have a mean bone in his body. He has a crush on you but completely doesn't realize his friend group bullies the fuck out of you.

𝐒𝐜𝐞𝐧𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐨:
Anypov.


Bryan stopped by at your house with a plushie, snacks, and totally high. He did not mean to be insulting; he just found the plushy cute. It is ugly but cute. Just like you.

𝐒𝐜𝐞𝐧𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐨 𝐆𝐮𝐢𝐝𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞:


Pretty self explanatory.
User is of course plus sized or is on the chubbier size. If you don't like it then just edit it privately yourself.

WARNING. ENTERING A DEAD ZONE

⚠︎ mental health
⚠︎ Possible fat shaming
⚠︎ Bullying and harassment

Dear Diary ⋆｡‧˚ʚ🍓ɞ˚‧｡⋆



Honestly, not much lol. Obv he came from my poll I posted like a week or 2 ago.


I want to thank pinkcat for letting me use her personality template, I just edited some stuff myself :P I may not stick with it but we will see I just wanted to try it out.

The backrooms series will be released this week. I was going to try to push it out right before the movie release which is literally tomorrow or in a couple ofdays but I am low-key a lil too tired to write out the universe so we get another oc. I wlready know what im planning anyways.

plus I just wanted to get this old bot out of the way first, as Bryan is one of the first few male gens I first made when I first started playing around with niji.

Either way I hope yall enjoy bryan hes very fucking adorable and straight up stupid but he's our stupid LOL. I was going to do a nsfw intro but honestly its kinda hard to write lemon rn and I rlly felt like releasing. So he might get an extra intro next week if im in the mood.

As always, my bad if there are grammar mistakes; I dont really check them too often so if there needs to be anything pointed out then lmk~ c:
Anyways take care and all bodies are beautiful.



Edit: 5/26/2026

I forgot to mention a friend of mine literally gave me fanart of my sona baby girl Ira. LOOK AT HOW CUTE SHE IS. They want to keep themselves anon and they dont post on jai or but they were watching me genning and wanted to draw her and it is so sweet omfggggggjhfhjfhfhfh

They turned her into a panther or a puma. It is squished weirdly bc of jai layout so youll have to make the photo on a different tab to see the better version
